summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FrameworkGuard AI production monitoring app - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly
passed_tests: User registration creates new customers with API keys
User login authenticates and returns tokens
Exception reporting creates incidents with API key auth
GET /api/incidents returns incident lists with proper pagination
Metrics reporting accepts JVM metrics via API key
Frontend login page renders with correct dark theme (#0A0D13)
Dashboard loads with stats cards and metrics visualization
Incidents page shows incident list with search and filtering
Stack trace analyzer allows sample loading and analysis setup
Alerts & Settings page displays ROI calculator and configuration
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Theme colors (#0A0D13 dark, #00E5A0 green accent) applied correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Responsive layout and loading states working properly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (18/18 UI tests passed)
